allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem C:\\Users\\zzc\\AppData\\Local\\Temp -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum | Select-Object @{N='TempSize\(MB\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.Sum / 1MB, 1\)}})

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path C:\\Windows\\Temp\) { Get-ChildItem C:\\Windows\\Temp -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum | Select-Object @{N='WinTempSize\(MB\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.Sum / 1MB, 1\)}} } else { Write-Output 'C:\\Windows\\Temp not found' })

PowerShell($f = @\('C:\\hiberfil.sys','C:\\pagefile.sys','C:\\swapfile.sys'\); foreach\($x in $f\) { if\(Test-Path $x\) { $i=Get-Item $x -Force; Write-Output "$x = $\([math]::Round\($i.Length/1GB, 1\)\) GB" } })

PowerShell($local = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA"; Get-ChildItem $local -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $s=\(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum; if\($s -gt 500MB\) { [PSCustomObject]@{Folder=$_.Name; Size_GB=[math]::Round\($s/1GB,2\)} } } | Sort-Object Size_GB -Descending)

PowerShell($d = @\('C:\\Windows\\SoftwareDistribution','C:\\Windows\\Temp','C:\\Windows\\Prefetch','C:\\Windows\\Installer'\); foreach\($x in $d\) { if\(Test-Path $x\) { $s=\(Get-ChildItem $x -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum; Write-Output "$x = $\([math]::Round\($s/1GB,1\)\) GB" } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem $env:LOCALAPPDATA -Directory | ForEach-Object { $n=$_.Name; $s=0; Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $s+=$_.Length }; if\($s -gt 500MB\){ "$n = $\([math]::Round\($s/1GB,1\)\) GB" } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem $env:APPDATA -Directory | ForEach-Object { $n=$_.Name; $s=0; Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $s+=$_.Length }; if\($s -gt 200MB\){ "$n = $\([math]::Round\($s/1GB,1\)\) GB" } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\Tencent" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $n=$_.Name; $s=0; Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $s+=$_.Length }; "$n = $\([math]::Round\($s/1GB,1\)\) GB" })
PowerShell(powercfg /a)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\NVIDIA" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $n=$_.Name; $s=0; Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $s+=$_.Length }; "$n = $\([math]::Round\($s/1GB,1\)\) GB" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $n=$_.Name; $s=0; Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $s+=$_.Length }; if\($s -gt 100MB\){"$n = $\([math]::Round\($s/1GB,1\)\) GB" } })

PowerShell($temp = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Temp"; $count = 0; $errCount = 0; Get-ChildItem $temp -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { try { Remove-Item $_.FullName -Force -Recurse -ErrorAction Stop; $count++ } catch { $errCount++ } }; Write-Output "Deleted: $count items, Failed: $errCount")

PowerShell($shell = New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application; $rb = $shell.Namespace\(0xA\); $items = $rb.Items\(\); $count = $items.Count; if\($count -gt 0\){ $items | ForEach-Object { Remove-Item $_.Path -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "Recycle Bin: $count items cleared" } else { Write-Output "Recycle Bin: already empty" })

PowerShell($temp = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Temp"; $before = \(Get-ChildItem $temp -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1GB; Write-Output "Temp before: $\([math]::Round\($before,1\)\) GB"; cmd /c "rmdir /s /q `"$temp`"" 2>$null; cmd /c "mkdir `"$temp`"" 2>$null; $after = \(Get-ChildItem $temp -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1GB; Write-Output "Temp after: $\([math]::Round\($after,1\)\) GB")

PowerShell($p = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\NVIDIA\\DXCache"; if\(Test-Path $p\){ $before=\(Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1GB; cmd /c "rmdir /s /q `"$p`"" 2>$null; cmd /c "mkdir `"$p`"" 2>$null; Write-Output "DXCache: $\([math]::Round\($before,1\)\) GB freed" } else { Write-Output "Not found" })

PowerShell($p = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\NVIDIA\\NvBackend"; if\(Test-Path $p\){ $before=\(Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1GB; cmd /c "rmdir /s /q `"$p`"" 2>$null; cmd /c "mkdir `"$p`"" 2>$null; Write-Output "NvBackend: $\([math]::Round\($before,1\)\) GB freed" } else { Write-Output "Not found" })

PowerShell($p = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\D3DSCache"; if\(Test-Path $p\){ $before=\(Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1GB; cmd /c "rmdir /s /q `"$p`"" 2>$null; cmd /c "mkdir `"$p`"" 2>$null; Write-Output "D3DSCache: $\([math]::Round\($before,1\)\) GB freed" } else { Write-Output "Not found" })

PowerShell($temp = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Temp"; $deleted=0; $failed=0; Get-ChildItem $temp -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { try { Remove-Item $_.FullName -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction Stop -Confirm:$false; $deleted++ } catch { $failed++ } }; Get-ChildItem $temp -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { try { Remove-Item $_.FullName -Force -ErrorAction Stop -Confirm:$false; $deleted++ } catch { $failed++ } }; Write-Output "Temp: $deleted deleted, $failed in use/skipped")

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== AppData 总览 ==="; $local = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA"; $roam = "$env:APPDATA"; $locallow = "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\LocalLow"; $total = 0; $lsize=0; $rsize=0; $llsize=0; if\(Test-Path $local\){$lsize=\(Get-ChildItem $local -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue|Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum}; if\(Test-Path $roam\){$rsize=\(Get-ChildItem $roam -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue|Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum}; if\(Test-Path $locallow\){$llsize=\(Get-ChildItem $locallow -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue|Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum}; Write-Output "Local: $\([math]::Round\($lsize/1GB,1\)\) GB"; Write-Output "Roaming: $\([math]::Round\($rsize/1GB,1\)\) GB"; Write-Output "LocalLow: $\([math]::Round\($llsize/1GB,1\)\) GB"; Write-Output "总计: $\([math]::Round\(\($lsize+$rsize+$llsize\)/1GB,1\)\) GB")

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Local \($env:LOCALAPPDATA\) ==="; Get-ChildItem $env:LOCALAPPDATA -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $n=$_.Name; $s=0; Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $s+=$_.Length }; if\($s -gt 100MB\){ Write-Output "  $n = $\([math]::Round\($s/1GB,1\)\) GB" } } | Sort-Object)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Roaming \($env:APPDATA\) ==="; Get-ChildItem $env:APPDATA -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $n=$_.Name; $s=0; Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $s+=$_.Length }; if\($s -gt 100MB\){ Write-Output "  $n = $\([math]::Round\($s/1GB,1\)\) GB" } } | Sort-Object)

PowerShell($ll = "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\LocalLow"; Write-Output "=== LocalLow \($ll\) ==="; Get-ChildItem $ll -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $n=$_.Name; $s=0; Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $s+=$_.Length }; if\($s -gt 50MB\){ Write-Output "  $n = $\([math]::Round\($s/1GB,1\)\) GB" } } | Sort-Object)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Local\\Tencent ==="; $lt = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Tencent"; if\(Test-Path $lt\) { Get-ChildItem $lt -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $s=0; Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $s+=$_.Length }; if\($s -gt 1MB\){ Write-Output "  $\($_.Name\) = $\([math]::Round\($s/1GB,2\)\) GB" } } }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Roaming\\Tencent ==="; $rt = "$env:APPDATA\\Tencent"; if\(Test-Path $rt\) { Get-ChildItem $rt -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $s=0; Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $s+=$_.Length }; if\($s -gt 1MB\){ Write-Output "  $\($_.Name\) = $\([math]::Round\($s/1GB,2\)\) GB" } } })
